evidence_quotes.quote: I am an avid fan of video games,

paragraphs.text: Greetings, I am an avid fan of video games, I played and both currencies in a couple of them too, one game that I used to really like called "Love Live - School Idol Festival" closed about 2 years ago as of writing this feedback making my purchase completely vanish, another game that could easily get a similar fate that I've bought items in is "Genshin Impact", an extremely popular game. There is a 20 years long trend in this space of "live service games" that need a server from the original company to work properly I agree with a lot of the Digital Fairness Act and I want a better Internet for everyone and tech companies to be a LOT less predatory with my money and time, I'd personally add another clause on requiring for online dependat/live service software to provide an end of life plan so that people can continue playing with the programs or apps they've bought or spent money into
